scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run audit && npm run test:rules && npm run build && npm run smoke
scripts.deploy:static: npm run build && npm run build:static && npx firebase-tools deploy --config firebase.static.json --only hosting --project sample-demo-website-2026 --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
scripts.deploy:hosting: npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project sample-demo-website-2026 --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
scripts.deploy:rules: npx firebase-tools deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project sample-demo-website-2026 --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
